simba-english.description: Speechify Simba English — highest-quality English TTS
simba-english.pricingNotes: Speechify Simba TTS estimates use the published $10 per 1M characters API reference rate. Subscription plans, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
